response.overview: A short film about the exhibits of the Lviv Museum of Ethnography and Artistic Crafts, which were added to after an expedition to the villages of the Yavoriv district. The history of the Yavoriv region. A performance by the musical and ethnographic ensemble "Nova Yavorivshchyna" of the Yavoriv Mining and Chemical Combine. A story about the master of wooden children's toys, Vasyl Pryima, master carver Sava Melnyk, and woodcarver Mykhailo Kanarchyk.
response.title: Yavoriv Colors
